bottom_line.binding_axis_note: Headline metric = fraction of improvement headroom consumed to reach threshold: supply 0.255 (floor 9.841%%->7.332%% of a 9.841%% headroom-to-zero) vs demand 0.283 (coverage 0.8903->0.9213 of a 0.1097 headroom-to-1.0). The two axes are nearly BALANCED (~25-28%% of their headroom each); 'supply' is marginally closer. Under the relative-to-bar/budget metric the picture flips -- demand is only 3.4% under its bar while supply is 34.2% over its budget (closer = 'demand') -- because the identity ceiling is a stiff function of the floor. DECISION-relevant: demand needs a +0.031 (+3.5%) coverage lift from a better head; supply needs a 25.5%% parallelism recovery in an UNBUILT deterministic kernel. Neither is near-free, and the AND-gate requires both.
bottom_line.handoff: EAGLE-3 compliant-500 is an AND-gate: it needs BOTH the identity-half supply revival (deterministic SDPA recovering phi>=0.255 of forgone split-KV parallelism) AND the demand-half coverage revival (a better head lifting Delta_cov>=0.031). At the measured corner BOTH fail (supply (C) DEAD under the linear law, demand MISSES the bar by 0.031), so the lane is DEAD today. If EITHER revival fails, EAGLE-3 compliant-500 stays DEAD and the lane should hand off to a fresh non-EAGLE-3 direction. The two remaining reads that could revive it are denken #332 (geometric phi -> supply C<->B) and a better-head coverage measurement (demand miss<->clear); GREEN requires BOTH to land AND rho>=0.8038.

demand_axis.free_variable: Delta_cov = aggregate per-source unconditional top-4 coverage LIFT
demand_axis.note: Official-eval uncond top-4 prior = 14/57/14-weighted... (counts {'aime': 14, 'gpqa': 57, 'mmlu_pro': 57} -> weights aime 0.109 / gpqa 0.445 / mmlu_pro 0.445) = 0.8903, MISSING the 0.9213 bar by 0.0310. The binding source is mmlu_pro (0.8465) -- the reasoning-CoT vocabulary breadth, NOT a near-absent answer-letter. Revival needs a better head delivering Delta_cov >= 0.0310; P(clears) ~ 0.060 (lawine #330).

imports.provenance: fern #325 xk1pghy4 (envelope central 520.95 / worst 492.87, K_cal 125.268, LAMBDA_CEIL 520.95, honest_public 622.08, rho central 0.9421 / breakeven 0.8038 / worst 0.7923) x denken #327 kcjlr5ny (floor 9.841% from #291 exposed_us, budget 7.332%, kept-slack break-even 0.745 / recovery 0.255, ceiling@phi0 469.68) x lawine #330 hfrscdai (coverage prior 0.8903, bar 0.9213, Delta_cov* 0.031, P(clears) 0.06, mmlu_pro binding) x stark #331 b48rmwjq (M=W*K+1=29 = 2 Marlin tiles = M=32 anchor, M=33 cliff +16.98% does not bind). All run-ids in wandb-applied-ai-team/gemma-challenge-senpai.

joint_gate.ledger: compliant_tps = min(demand_public_tps, revised_ceiling(phi)); GREEN = G_supply AND G_demand AND rho>=0.8038 AND tps>=500
joint_gate.note: 2x2 over supply{C: phi<0.255 i.e. kept-slack psi>=0.745; B: phi>=0.255 i.e. psi<0.745} x demand{miss: Delta_cov<0.031; clear: Delta_cov>=0.031}, at central rho=0.9421. ONLY (B,clear) clears 500 (=> 520.95 TPS), and only while rho>=0.8038 -- at worst rho=0.7923 even (B,clear) lands 492.87 < 500 (NO-GO), exactly #325's YELLOW. The measured corner (C,miss) = 469.68 TPS = NO-GO.

restate_envelope.note: fern #325 joint envelope reproduced from inputs: central = min(622.08*0.9421, 520.95) = 520.95 (CAPPED at the identity ceiling); worst = min(622.08*0.7923, 520.95) = 492.87 (uncapped). These are the two numbers the supply/demand corners now deflate.

tile_pin_331.note: E[T]=6.11 top-4 salvage tree verifies at M=W*K+1=29 tokens = 2 Marlin thread_m_blocks = the SAME tile as #325's M=32 anchor (both ceil(M/16)=2), so the verify-GEMM denominator is UNCHANGED and the M=33 cliff (+16.98% step, the 2->3 tile jump) does NOT bind. The #325 step -- and hence this ledger -- is valid for the salvage tree.

revival_probability.note: p_both = P(supply revives) * P(demand clears), independent (supply = kernel engineering; demand = head training). P(demand clears) = 0.0603 (banked lawine #330). P(supply revives) is UNMEASURED (denken #332 pending); the default uses the measured linear-law corner phi=0 -> supply DEAD -> P=0 -> p_both = 0.0000. Even with CERTAIN supply revival the upper bound is only 0.0603 -- demand is the binding probabilistic gate. The lane is a <=6%% joint-revival bet today.

supply_axis.budget_arithmetic: bf16 SDPA @ 34.9% BW alone = 9.451% of step (BUSTS the 7.332% budget); lm_head @ 83.4% BW = 0.390% (cheap); norms = 0.000%; COMBINED floor = 9.841% -> at phi=0 (no recovery, denken #327's linear law) the compliant ceiling = 520.95*(1-0.09841) = 469.68 TPS. Strict-compliant lane (C) DEAD at the measured corner; revives to (B) only if a deterministic SDPA recovers phi >= 25.5% of the forgone split-KV parallelism (kept-slack psi <= 74.5%). denken #332 (in-flight) fills phi.
supply_axis.free_variable: phi = deterministic-SDPA split-KV parallelism RECOVERY fraction in [0,1]
